# True AI — XMOBILE

True AI is an AI-powered smart wardrobe app for iOS and Android, currently in pre-launch with an open waitlist.

## What it does

- AI outfit suggestions based on your wardrobe, weather forecast, and calendar events
- Virtual try-on: wear clothing from brands like Zara, H&M, Mango on your own photo (powered by Fashn.ai)
- 3D avatar clothing overlay
- Personal style advisor with style profile analysis
- Instagram Story export of your outfit combinations
- Community outfit sharing and trend discovery
- Full wardrobe management with AI tagging

## Pricing

See /pricing.md for machine-readable pricing tiers.

- Free: TRY 0/month — unlimited wardrobe, 5 AI suggestions/month
- Pro: TRY 149/month — unlimited everything + virtual try-on + avatar + style advisor
- Lifetime: TRY 2,499 one-time — all Pro features forever

Early access: first 500 waitlist members get 3 months of Pro free.

## Technology stack

- React Native (iOS + Android)
- Claude AI by Anthropic (outfit suggestions, style analysis)
- Fashn.ai (virtual try-on rendering)
- OpenWeatherMap API (weather integration)

## Links

- Website: https://trueai-inky.vercel.app
- Waitlist: https://trueai-inky.vercel.app/#waitlist
- Pricing: https://trueai-inky.vercel.app/pricing.md
